text: Surrounded by glass, light, and information, I feel a keen sense of curiosity and detachment. The world here is clean and purposeful, angled towards innovation. I am both a participant and an observer, swept along by the drive to reflect and improve, yet aware of the bureaucracy and performed optimism. The R+D motif inspires contemplation: am I inside a living experiment, or just wandering through it? My presence, though real, feels ephemeral—an echo among objects designed to shape better futures.
